command:
import asyncio, sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def main():
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.connect_over_cdp('http://localhost:9222')
        ctx = browser.contexts[0]
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        print('NAV to add-a-place...')
        await page.goto('https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/0/add-a-place', wait_until='networkidle', timeout=30000)
        await asyncio.sleep(3)
        t = await page.title()
        print(f'Title: {t.encode("ascii","replace").decode()}')
        print(f'URL: {page.url}')
        inputs = await page.query_selector_all('input')
        print(f'Inputs: {len(inputs)}')
        for i, inp in enumerate(inputs[:12]):
            n = (await inp.get_attribute('name') or '').encode('ascii','replace').decode()
            ph = (await inp.get_attribute('placeholder') or '').encode('ascii','replace').decode()
            ar = (await inp.get_attribute('aria-label') or '').encode('ascii','replace').decode()
            vis = await inp.is_visible()
            val = ''
            if vis:
                try: val = (await inp.input_value()).encode('ascii','replace').decode()
                except: pass
            print(f'  [{i}] name={n} | ph={ph} | aria={ar} | vis={vis} | val={val[:40]}')
        btns = await page.query_selector_all('button')
        print(f'Buttons: {len(btns)}')
        for i, b in enumerate(btns[:10]):
            txt = (await b.inner_text()).encode('ascii','replace').decode()
            print(f'  btn[{i}]: {txt[:50]}')

asyncio.run(main())
description: Playwright CDP - فحص حقول صفحة Add a Place مع إصلاح الترميز
